task: STAFF-002 — Active Orders Dashboard: read-only branch-scoped staff order endpoints (GET /api/staff/orders, GET /api/staff/orders/:orderId) + mobile polling feed and read-only detail screen
approver: vc-execute-agent (session) — pending orchestrator EVL + human closeout
why: Two new staff API endpoints sit on a cross-branch trust boundary: a staff member must only ever see orders belonging to their own assigned branch. A flaw would leak another branch's order data (customer order contents, totals, timings). Branch scope is resolved server-side from the session via resolveBranchScope; no client-supplied branch id is honored on either endpoint. This is the trust-boundary risk class, so a manual-first evidence pack is required before finalize.
